segments.text: to be subject to rulers and authorities, to obey, to be ready for every good work
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: to speak evil of no one, to be peaceable, gentle, showing all humility to all men
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For we ourselves were also once
foolish, disobedient, deceived, serving various lusts and pleasures, living in malice and envy, hateful and hating one another
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But when the kindness and the love of God our Savior toward man appeared
not by works of righteousness which we have done, but
according to His mercy He saved us, through the washing of regeneration and renewing of the Holy Spirit
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: whom He poured out on us abundantly through Jesus Christ our Savior
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: that having been justified by His grace we should become heirs according to the hope of eternal life
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: This is a faithful saying, and
these things I want you to affirm constantly, that those who have believed in God should be careful to maintain good works. These things are good and profitable to men
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But avoid foolish disputes, genealogies, contentions, and strivings about the law; for they are unprofitable and useless
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Reject a divisive man after the first and second admonition
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: knowing that such a person is warped and sinning, being self-condemned
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: When I send Artemas to you, or Tychicus, be diligent to come to me at Nicopolis, for I have decided to spend the winter there
Send Zenas the lawyer and Apollos on their journey with haste, that they may lack nothing
And let our people also learn to maintain good works, to meet urgent needs, that they may not be unfruitful
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: All who are with me greet you. Greet those who love us in the faith. Grace be with you all. Amen
